codeReview.summary: The feature delivers dedicated resetFeature coverage matching the described contract: transitive reset through dependsOn/blockedBy, conditional activeFeatureId clearing, conditional last-run projection clearing, singular/plural summary text, and approval-based status derivation. The new tests in tests/reset-dependencies.test.ts are aligned with validation assertions VAL-CORRECT-033 through VAL-CORRECT-037 and no correctness issues were found in scope.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit 791af06 diff, transcript skeleton, and relevant runtime behavior for m2-reset-dependencies. Coverage is complete for the feature requirements and validation-contract assertions, with no blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
